title: chasmone holosericea var. incana
intro: Chasmone holosericea var. incana, also known as prickly ash, is a plant species native to the Americas that belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve pain, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Chasmone holosericea var. incana include its potential to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of various ailments, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the roots and stems in water or oil, and it can also be used as a tincture or in capsule form.
